00006| .. _fls_hdwwrsyunir:
00007| 
00008| Program Structure and Compilation
00009| =================================
00010| 
00011| .. _fls_s35hob3i7lr:
00012| 
00013| Source Files
00014| ------------
00015| 
00016| .. rubric:: Syntax
00017| 
00018| .. syntax::
00019| 
00020|    SourceFile ::=
00021|        ZeroWidthNoBreakSpace?
00022|        Shebang?
00023|        InnerAttributeOrDoc*
00024|        Item*
00025| 
00026|    ZeroWidthNoBreakSpace ::=
00027|        $$\u{FEFF}$$
00028| 
00029|    Shebang ::=
00030|        $$#!$$ ~[NewLine]*
00031| 
00032|    NewLine ::=
00033|        $$\n$$
00034| 
00035| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00036| 
00037| :dp:`fls_4vicosdeaqmp`
00038| A :dt:`source file` contains the program text consisting of :t:`[inner
00039| attribute]s`, :t:`[inner doc comment]s`, and :t:`[item]s`. The location of a
00040| :t:`source file` is tool defined.
00041| 
00042| :dp:`fls_ann3cha1xpek`
00043| A :s:`Shebang` does not have an effect on the compilation.
00044| 
00045| .. _fls_e9hwvqsib5d5:
00046| 
00047| Modules
00048| -------
00049| 
00050| .. rubric:: Syntax
00051| 
00052| .. syntax::
00053| 
00054|    ModuleDeclaration ::=
00055|        $$unsafe$$? $$mod$$ Name ModuleSpecification
00056| 
00057|    ModuleSpecification ::=
00058|        InlineModuleSpecification
00059|      | OutlineModuleSpecification
00060| 
00061|    InlineModuleSpecification ::=
00062|        $${$$
00063|          InnerAttributeOrDoc*
00064|          Item*
00065|        $$}$$
00066| 
00067|    OutlineModuleSpecification ::=
00068|        $$;$$
00069| 
00070| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00071| 
00072| :dp:`fls_odd1hj3y1mgu`
00073| A :dt:`module` is a container for zero or more :t:`[item]s`.
00074| 
00075| :dp:`fls_whgv72emrm47`
00076| The ``unsafe`` :t:`keyword` of a :t:`module` is rejected, but may still
00077| be consumed by :t:`[macro]s`.
00078| 
00079| :dp:`fls_qypjjpcf8uwq`
00080| An :dt:`inline module` is a :t:`module` with an :s:`InlineModuleSpecification`.
00081| 
00082| :dp:`fls_cavwpr1ybk37`
00083| An :dt:`outline module` is a :t:`module` with an :s:`OutlineModuleSpecification`.
00084| 
00085| :dp:`fls_plepew2319g4`
00086| An :t:`outline module` loads a :t:`source file` and considers the text of the
00087| :t:`source file` to be inlined within the context of the :t:`outline module`.
00088| 
00089| :dp:`fls_1aruwps62c4p`
00090| The location of a :t:`module` :t:`source file` can be specified using
00091| :t:`attribute` :c:`path`.
00092| 
00093| .. rubric:: Examples
00094| 
00095| .. code-block:: rust
00096| 
00097|    #[path = "path/to/module"]
00098|    pub mod module {
00099|    	#![allow(dead_code)]
00100| 
00101|         struct Struct;
00102|         pub mod other;
00103|    }
00104| 
00105| .. _fls_maw4u1o8q37u:
00106| 
00107| Crates
00108| ------
00109| 
00110| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00111| 
00112| :dp:`fls_qwghk79ok5h0`
00113| A :t:`crate` is a unit of compilation and linking that contains a tree of
00114| nested :t:`[module]s`.
00115| 
00116| :dp:`fls_unxalgMqIr3v`
00117| The :dt:`crate type` of a :t:`crate` is the value of the :t:`attribute`
00118| ``crate_type`` of a :t:`crate` or the value of ``--crate-type`` flag passed to
00119| the tool compiling the :t:`crate`.
00120| 
00121| :dp:`fls_e7jGvXvTsFpC`
00122| The :t:`crate type` of a :t:`crate` if not specified is ``bin``.
00123| 
00124| :dp:`fls_kQiJPwb2Hjcc`
00125| A :t:`crate` may be subject to multiple :t:`[crate type]s`, treating each type
00126| as a separate :t:`crate`.
00127| 
00128| :dp:`fls_9ub6ks8qrang`
00129| A :t:`binary crate` is a :t:`crate` whose :t:`crate type` is ``bin``.
00130| 
00131| :dp:`fls_OyFwBtDGVimT`
00132| A :t:`binary crate` that is not subject to :t:`attribute` ``no_main`` shall have
00133| a :t:`function` in scope of its :t:`crate root module` under the :t:`name`
00134| ``main`` with a :dt:`main function signature`.
00135| 
00136| :dp:`fls_jQqXxPyND1ds`
00137| The :t:`function` in scope of a :t:`binary crate`'s :t:`crate root module` under
00138| the :t:`name` ``main`` with a :t:`main function signature` is the :t:`binary
00139| crate`'s :t:`program entry point`.
00140| 
00141| :dp:`fls_d9nn4yuiw1ja`
00142| A :dt:`library crate` is a :t:`crate` whose :t:`crate type` is ``lib``, ``rlib``,
00143| ``staticlib``, ``dylib``, or ``cdylib``.
00144| 
00145| :dp:`fls_Mf62VqAhoZ3c`
00146| A :dt:`proc-macro crate` is a :t:`crate` whose :t:`crate type` is ``proc-macro``.
00147| 
00148| :dp:`fls_RJJmN4tP7j4m`
00149| A :t:`proc-macro crate` shall not declare :t:`[item]s` in its :t:`crate root
00150| module` with  :t:`public visibility` unless the :t:`item` is a :t:`procedural
00151| macro`.
00152| 
00153| :dp:`fls_h93C3wfbAoz1`
00154| Only a :t:`proc-macro crate` shall declare :t:`[procedural macro]s`.
00155| 
00156| .. _fls_gklst7joeo33:
00157| 
00158| Crate Imports
00159| -------------
00160| 
00161| .. rubric:: Syntax
00162| 
00163| .. syntax::
00164| 
00165|    ExternalCrateImport ::=
00166|        $$extern$$ $$crate$$ CrateIndication Renaming? $$;$$
00167| 
00168|    CrateIndication ::=
00169|        Identifier
00170|      | $$self$$
00171| 
00172| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00173| 
00174| :dp:`fls_d0pa807s5d5h`
00175| A :t:`crate import` specifies a required dependency on an external :t:`crate`.
00176| 
00177| :dp:`fls_vfam3wzeAiah`
00178| A :dt:`crate indication` is a :t:`construct` that indicates a :t:`crate`.
00179| 
00180| :dp:`fls_2v7k7p4v0xra`
00181| A :t:`renaming` provides an alternative :t:`name` for an existing name.
00182| 
00183| :dp:`fls_ft860vkz0lkc`
00184| A :t:`crate import` binds an external :t:`crate` to its :t:`crate indication`.
00185| 
00186| :dp:`fls_k90qtnf8kgu1`
00187| :t:`Crate indication` ``self`` shall require a :t:`renaming`.
00188| 
00189| :dp:`fls_siv8bl6s2ndu`
00190| A :t:`crate import` with a :t:`renaming` with an :t:`identifier` binds the
00191| external :t:`crate` to a local :t:`name` and introduces the local :t:`name` into
00192| the enclosing :t:`scope`.
00193| 
00194| :dp:`fls_7vz5n3x6jo1s`
00195| If a :t:`crate import` appears at the :t:`crate root module`, then the
00196| :t:`crate indication` is added to the :t:`external prelude`.
00197| 
00198| :dp:`fls_3bgpc8m8yk4p`
00199| A :t:`crate indication` shall resolve to an external :t:`crate`. The process of
00200| resolving a :t:`crate indication` to an external :t:`crate` is tool-defined.
00201| 
00202| .. _fls_5w50kf83oo1u:
00203| 
00204| Compilation Roots
00205| -----------------
00206| 
00207| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00208| 
00209| :dp:`fls_fhiqvgdamq5`
00210| A :t:`crate root module` is the root of the nested :t:`module` tree of a
00211| :t:`crate`.
00212| 
00213| :dp:`fls_1NrcosNZJu5V`
00214| A :dt:`crate root` is the :t:`crate root module` of a :t:`crate`.
00215| 
00216| :dp:`fls_tk8tl2e0a34`
00217| A tool can define a :t:`crate root module` for a single :t:`crate`.
00218| 
00219| :dp:`fls_bsyfxdk3ap1t`
00220| A :dt:`compilation root` is an input to a compilation performed by a tool. A
00221| :t:`crate root module` is a :t:`compilation root`.

00293| .. rubric:: Examples

00295| .. code-block:: rust
00296| 
00297|    macro_rules! generate_pairs {
00298|        ( $( $first:ident )* ; $( &second:ident )* )

00303| .. _fls_wn1i6hzg2ff7:
00304| 
00305| Procedural Macros
00306| -----------------
00307| 
00308| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00309| 
00310| :dp:`fls_ejbddhggstd2`
00311| A :dt:`procedural macro` is a :t:`macro` that encapsulates syntactic
00312| transformations in a :dt:`function`. :t:`[Procedural macro]s` consume one or more
00313| streams of :t:`[token]s` and produce a stream of :t:`[token]s`.
00314| 
00315| :dp:`fls_pcce9gmjpxba`
00316| :t:`[Procedural macro]s` shall be defined in a :dt:`crate` subject to
00317| :t:`attribute` :c:`crate_type` where the type is ``proc-macro``.
00318| 
00319| :dp:`fls_vtzuplb1p3s`
00320| A :dt:`macro implementation function` is the :t:`function` that encapsulates the
00321| syntactic transformations of a :t:`procedural macro`.
00322| 
00323| :dp:`fls_mewfehvgm16r`
00324| A :t:`macro implementation function` enters the :t:`name` of the
00325| :t:`procedural macro` into the :t:`macro namespace`.
00326| 
00327| .. _fls_2d6bqnpy6tvs:
00328| 
00329| Function-like Macros
00330| ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
00331| 
00332| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00333| 
00334| :dp:`fls_utd3zqczix`
00335| A :dt:`function-like macro` is a :t:`procedural macro` that consumes a stream of
00336| :t:`[token]s` and produces a stream of :t:`[token]s`.
00337| 
00338| :dp:`fls_ojr30lf6jfx0`
00339| The :t:`macro implementation function` of a :t:`function-like macro` shall be
00340| subject to the following restrictions:
00341| 
00342| * :dp:`fls_ljkjmegynhiy`
00343|   It shall be subject to :t:`attribute` :c:`proc_macro`,
00344| 
00345| * :dp:`fls_8a8qhzjw5hax`
00346|   It shall be subject to :t:`visibility modifier` ``pub``,
00347| 
00348| * :dp:`fls_ofzql79i9if`
00349|   It shall lack :t:`[function qualifier]s`,
00350| 
00351| * :dp:`fls_j1wsyzip2qb3`
00352|   It shall lack :t:`[generic parameter]s`,
00353| 
00354| * :dp:`fls_etyo9bmzxby6`
00355|   It shall have a single :dt:`function parameter` whose :t:`type specification`
00356|   indicates :t:`type` :std:`proc_macro::TokenStream`,
00357| 
00358| * :dp:`fls_mkl9b38m0sf1`
00359|   It shall have a :t:`return type` whose :t:`type specification` indicates
00360|   :t:`type` :std:`proc_macro::TokenStream`.
00361| 
00362| :dp:`fls_lfmb22bfnrye`
00363| A :t:`function-like macro` is invoked using a :t:`macro invocation`.
00364| 
00365| :dp:`fls_fbgal48cgj44`
00366| The sole parameter of the :t:`macro implementation function` captures the
00367| :t:`token` stream produced from the :s:`DelimitedTokenTree` of the
00368| :t:`macro invocation`, excluding outer :s:`[Delimiter]s`.
00369| 
00370| .. rubric:: Examples
00371| 
00372| .. code-block:: rust
00373| 
00374|    #[proc_macro]
00375|    pub fn make_answer_to_life(_items: TokenStream) -> TokenStream {
00376|        "fn answer_to_life() -> u32 { 42 }".parse().unwrap()
00377|    }
00378| 
00379| .. _fls_o8s3r7m90q59:
00380| 
00381| Derive Macros
00382| ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
00383| 
00384| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00385| 
00386| :dp:`fls_e5x92q2rq8a0`
00387| A :dt:`derive macro` is a :t:`procedural macro` that consumes a stream of
00388| :t:`[token]s` and produces a stream of :t:`[token]s`. :t:`[Derive macro]s` are
00389| used to construct new syntax for :t:`[abstract data type]s`.
00390| 
00391| :dp:`fls_ldw75sy5uj7p`
00392| The :t:`macro implementation function` of a :t:`derive macro` shall be subject
00393| to the following restrictions:
00394| 
00395| * :dp:`fls_7gcnui9beky`
00396|   It shall be subject to :t:`attribute` :c:`proc_macro_derive`,
00397| 
00398| * :dp:`fls_ef30ropg7dhx`
00399|   It shall be subject to :t:`visibility modifier` ``pub``,
00400| 
00401| * :dp:`fls_mo00vqm9xfqc`
00402|   It shall lack :t:`[function qualifier]s`,
00403| 
00404| * :dp:`fls_gr9wugeqyb3b`
00405|   It shall lack :t:`[generic parameter]s`,
00406| 
00407| * :dp:`fls_npnze2cg8ae`
00408|   It shall have a single :t:`function parameter` whose :t:`type specification`
00409|   indicates :t:`type` :std:`proc_macro::TokenStream`,
00410| 
00411| * :dp:`fls_w2h4lk6bmht`
00412|   It shall have a :t:`return type` whose :t:`type specification` indicates
00413|   :t:`type` :std:`proc_macro::TokenStream`.
00414| 
00415| :dp:`fls_x96a0xzcyrko`
00416| A :t:`derive macro` is invoked using :t:`attribute` :c:`derive`.
00417| 
00418| :dp:`fls_caa16usjxryg`
00419| The sole parameter of the :t:`macro implementation function` captures
00420| the :t:`token` stream produced from the related :s:`EnumDeclaration`,
00421| :s:`StructDeclaration`, or :s:`UnionDeclaration`.
00422| 
00423| :dp:`fls_H5ipqqlH3pJh`
00424| A :t:`derive macro` adds all its declared :t:`[derive helper attribute]s` into
00425| the :t:`derive helper attribute` scope of the :t:`abstract data type` the
00426| :t:`attribute` is attached to.
00427| 
00428| :dp:`fls_mobky5ck1mi`
00429| A :dt:`derive helper attribute` is an :t:`inert attribute` that acts as a
00430| hint to :t:`attribute` :c:`derive`.
00431| 
00432| .. rubric:: Examples
00433| 
00434| .. code-block:: rust
00435| 
00436|    #[proc_macro_derive(Answer)]
00437|    pub fn derive_answer_to_life(_items: TokenStream) -> TokenStream {
00438|        "fn answer_to_life() -> u32 { 42 }".parse().unwrap()
00439|    }
00440| 
00441| .. _fls_4vjbkm4ceymk:
00442| 
00443| Attribute Macros
00444| ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
00445| 
00446| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00447| 
00448| :dp:`fls_l3epi1dqpi8o`
00449| An :dt:`attribute macro` is a :t:`procedural macro` that consumes two streams
00450| of :t:`[token]s` to produce a single stream of :t:`[token]s`, and defines a
00451| new :t:`outer attribute` that can be attached to :t:`[item]s`.
00452| :t:`[Attribute macro]s` are used to replace :t:`[item]s` with other
00453| :t:`[item]s`.
00454| 
00455| :dp:`fls_3sublbi9bz7k`
00456| The :t:`macro implementation function` of an :t:`attribute macro` shall be
00457| subject to the following restrictions:
00458| 
00459| * :dp:`fls_eb8jxl70wmeh`
00460|   It shall be subject to :t:`attribute` :c:`proc_macro_attribute`,
00461| 
00462| * :dp:`fls_7ugtmobgb2t9`
00463|   It shall be subject to :t:`visibility modifier` ``pub``,
00464| 
00465| * :dp:`fls_y700oif45wum`
00466|   It shall lack :t:`[function qualifier]s`,
00467| 
00468| * :dp:`fls_hhsf1a9p6o55`
00469|   It shall lack :t:`[generic parameter]s`,
00470| 
00471| * :dp:`fls_4g932k8ueyqp`
00472|   It shall have two :t:`[function parameter]s` whose :t:`[type specification]s`
00473|   indicate :t:`type` :std:`proc_macro::TokenStream`,
00474| 
00475| * :dp:`fls_f5qy1pnlbpng`
00476|   It shall have a :t:`return type` whose :t:`type specification` indicates type
00477|   :std:`proc_macro::TokenStream`.
00478| 
00479| :dp:`fls_rzn48xylk4yj`
00480| An :t:`attribute macro` is invoked using an :t:`attribute` of the form
00481| 
00482| * :dp:`fls_78400zh02sdq`
00483|   ``#[SimplePath]``, or
00484| 
00485| * :dp:`fls_eyesmvuwpjn1`
00486|   ``#[SimplePath DelimitedTokenTree]``
00487| 
00488| :dp:`fls_fku5beu3mr4c`
00489| The first :t:`function parameter` of the :t:`macro implementation function`
00490| captures the :t:`token` stream produced from the :s:`DelimitedTokenTree`
00491| of the invoking :t:`attribute`, excluding outer :s:`[Delimiter]s`. If no
00492| :s:`DelimitedTokenTree` is provided, then the :t:`token` stream is considered
00493| empty.
00494| 
00495| :dp:`fls_knjsslplv5ri`
00496| The second :t:`function parameter` of the :t:`macro implementation function`
00497| captures the :t:`token` stream produced from the related :t:`item`, including
00498| all :t:`[outer attribute]s` that apply to that :dt:`item`.
00499| 
00500| .. rubric:: Examples
00501| 
00502| .. code-block:: rust
00503| 
00504|    #[proc_macro_attribute]
00505|    pub fn output_and_return_item
00506|        (attr: TokenStream, item: TokenStream) -> TokenStream
00507|    {
00508|        println!("attr: \"{}\"", attr.to_string());
00509|        println!("item: \"{}\"", item.to_string());
00510|        item
00511|    }
00512| 
00513| .. _fls_vnvt40pa48n8:
00514| 
00515| Macro Invocation
00516| ----------------
00517| 
00518| .. rubric:: Syntax
00519| 
00520| .. syntax::
00521| 
00522|    MacroInvocation ::=
00523|        SimplePath $$!$$ DelimitedTokenTree
00524| 
00525|    DelimitedTokenTree ::=
00526|        $$($$ TokenTree* $$)$$
00527|      | $$[$$ TokenTree* $$]$$
00528|      | $${$$ TokenTree* $$}$$
00529| 
00530|    TokenTree ::=
00531|        DelimitedTokenTree
00532|      | NonDelimitedToken
00533| 
00534|    TerminatedMacroInvocation ::=
00535|        SimplePath $$!$$ $$($$ TokenTree* $$)$$ $$;$$
00536|      | SimplePath $$!$$ $$[$$ TokenTree* $$]$$ $$;$$
00537|      | SimplePath $$!$$ $${$$ TokenTree* $$}$$
00538| 
00539| :dp:`fls_wushtmw9qt3y`
00540| A :ds:`NonDelimitedToken` is any :t:`lexical element` in category
00541| :s:`LexicalElement`, except category :s:`Delimiter`.
00542| 
00543| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00544| 
00545| :dp:`fls_snpxxcqhtjfv`
00546| A :dt:`macro invocation` is a call of a :t:`declarative macro` or
00547| :t:`function-like macro` that is expanded statically and replaced with the
00548| result of the :t:`macro`.
00549| 
00550| :dp:`fls_6v06zvi1ctub`
00551| A :dt:`terminated macro invocation` is a :t:`macro invocation` that may be used
00552| as a :dt:`statement`.
00553| 
00554| .. rubric:: Examples
00555| 
00556| :dp:`fls_338rmbazl67o`
00557| See :p:`fls_xa7lp0zg1ol2` for the declaration of ``answer_to_life``.
00558| 
00559| .. code-block:: rust
00560| 
00561|    answer_to_life!();
00562| 
00563| :dp:`fls_lrr7gg8tian`
00564| See :p:`fls_8nzypdu9j3ge` for the declaration of ``square``.
00565| 
00566| .. code-block:: rust
00567| 
00568|    square!(5);
00569| 
00570| :dp:`fls_8qxwwf4trnl`
00571| See :p:`fls_k01lsksqtq1r` for the declaration of ``generate_pairs``.
00572| 
00573| .. code-block:: rust
00574| 
00575|    generate_pairs!(1, 2, 3; 9, 8, 7);
00576| 
00577| :dp:`fls_8z1sgtvchhhw`
00578| See :p:`fls_2d6bqnpy6tvs` for the declaration of
00579| ``make_answer_to_life``.
00580| 
00581| .. code-block:: rust
00582| 
00583|    make_answer_to_life!();
00584| 
00585| :dp:`fls_d9w3dn2yn7mo`
00586| See :p:`fls_o8s3r7m90q59` for the declaration of ``Answer``.
00587| 
00588| .. code-block:: rust

00602| .. _fls_wjldgtio5o75:

00604| Macro Expansion
00605| ---------------
00606| 
00607| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00608| 
00609| :dp:`fls_xscdaxvs4wx4`
00610| :dt:`Macro expansion` is the process of statically executing a
00611| :t:`macro invocation` and replacing it with the produced output of the
00612| :t:`macro invocation`.
00613| 
00614| :dp:`fls_nz5stwcc41gk`
00615| :t:`Macro expansion` of :t:`[declarative macro]s` proceeds as follows:
00616| 
00617| #. :dp:`fls_40xq8Ri1OMZZ`
00618|    The :s:`TokenTree` of the :t:`macro invocation` has all
00619|    :t:`[outer block doc]s` and :t:`[outer line doc]s` contained within replaced
00620|    by their equivalent :t:`attribute` :c:`doc` representation.

files.before:
.. SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT OR Apache-2.0
   SPDX-FileCopyrightText: The Ferrocene Developers

.. default-domain:: spec

.. _fls_hdwwrsyunir:

Program Structure and Compilation
=================================

.. _fls_s35hob3i7lr:

Source Files
------------

.. rubric:: Syntax

.. syntax::

   SourceFile ::=
       ZeroWidthNoBreakSpace?
       Shebang?
       InnerAttributeOrDoc*
       Item*

   ZeroWidthNoBreakSpace ::=
       $$\u{FEFF}$$

   Shebang ::=
       $$#!$$ ~[NewLine]*

   NewLine ::=
       $$\n$$

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_4vicosdeaqmp`
A :dt:`source file` contains the program text consisting of :t:`[inner
attribute]s`, :t:`[inner doc comment]s`, and :t:`[item]s`. The location of a
:t:`source file` is tool defined.

:dp:`fls_ann3cha1xpek`
A :s:`Shebang` does not have an effect on the compilation.

.. _fls_e9hwvqsib5d5:

Modules
-------

.. rubric:: Syntax

.. syntax::

   ModuleDeclaration ::=
       $$unsafe$$? $$mod$$ Name ModuleSpecification

   ModuleSpecification ::=
       InlineModuleSpecification
     | OutlineModuleSpecification

   InlineModuleSpecification ::=
       $${$$
         InnerAttributeOrDoc*
         Item*
       $$}$$

   OutlineModuleSpecification ::=
       $$;$$

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_odd1hj3y1mgu`
A :dt:`module` is a container for zero or more :t:`[item]s`.

:dp:`fls_whgv72emrm47`
The ``unsafe`` :t:`keyword` of a :t:`module` is rejected, but may still
be consumed by :t:`[macro]s`.

:dp:`fls_qypjjpcf8uwq`
An :dt:`inline module` is a :t:`module` with an :s:`InlineModuleSpecification`.

:dp:`fls_cavwpr1ybk37`
An :dt:`outline module` is a :t:`module` with an :s:`OutlineModuleSpecification`.

:dp:`fls_plepew2319g4`
An :t:`outline module` loads a :t:`source file` and considers the text of the
:t:`source file` to be inlined within the context of the :t:`outline module`.

:dp:`fls_1aruwps62c4p`
The location of a :t:`module` :t:`source file` can be specified using
:t:`attribute` :c:`path`.

.. rubric:: Examples

.. code-block:: rust

   #[path = "path/to/module"]
   pub mod module {
   	#![allow(dead_code)]

        struct Struct;
        pub mod other;
   }

.. _fls_maw4u1o8q37u:

Crates
------

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_qwghk79ok5h0`
A :t:`crate` is a unit of compilation and linking that contains a tree of
nested :t:`[module]s`.

:dp:`fls_unxalgMqIr3v`
The :dt:`crate type` of a :t:`crate` is the value of the :t:`attribute`
``crate_type`` of a :t:`crate` or the value of ``--crate-type`` flag passed to
the tool compiling the :t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_e7jGvXvTsFpC`
The :t:`crate type` of a :t:`crate` if not specified is ``bin``.

:dp:`fls_kQiJPwb2Hjcc`
A :t:`crate` may be subject to multiple :t:`[crate type]s`, treating each type
as a separate :t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_9ub6ks8qrang`
A :t:`binary crate` is a :t:`crate` whose :t:`crate type` is ``bin``.

:dp:`fls_OyFwBtDGVimT`
A :t:`binary crate` that is not subject to :t:`attribute` ``no_main`` shall have
a :t:`function` in scope of its :t:`crate root module` under the :t:`name`
``main`` with a :dt:`main function signature`.

:dp:`fls_jQqXxPyND1ds`
The :t:`function` in scope of a :t:`binary crate`'s :t:`crate root module` under
the :t:`name` ``main`` with a :t:`main function signature` is the :t:`binary
crate`'s :t:`program entry point`.

:dp:`fls_d9nn4yuiw1ja`
A :dt:`library crate` is a :t:`crate` whose :t:`crate type` is ``lib``, ``rlib``,
``staticlib``, ``dylib``, or ``cdylib``.

:dp:`fls_Mf62VqAhoZ3c`
A :dt:`proc-macro crate` is a :t:`crate` whose :t:`crate type` is ``proc-macro``.

:dp:`fls_RJJmN4tP7j4m`
A :t:`proc-macro crate` shall not declare :t:`[item]s` in its :t:`crate root
module` with  :t:`public visibility` unless the :t:`item` is a :t:`procedural
macro`.

:dp:`fls_h93C3wfbAoz1`
Only a :t:`proc-macro crate` shall declare :t:`[procedural macro]s`.

.. _fls_gklst7joeo33:

Crate Imports
-------------

.. rubric:: Syntax

.. syntax::

   ExternalCrateImport ::=
       $$extern$$ $$crate$$ CrateIndication Renaming? $$;$$

   CrateIndication ::=
       Identifier
     | $$self$$

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_d0pa807s5d5h`
A :t:`crate import` specifies a required dependency on an external :t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_vfam3wzeAiah`
A :dt:`crate indication` is a :t:`construct` that indicates a :t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_2v7k7p4v0xra`
A :t:`renaming` provides an alternative :t:`name` for an existing name.

:dp:`fls_ft860vkz0lkc`
A :t:`crate import` binds an external :t:`crate` to its :t:`crate indication`.

:dp:`fls_k90qtnf8kgu1`
:t:`Crate indication` ``self`` shall require a :t:`renaming`.

:dp:`fls_siv8bl6s2ndu`
A :t:`crate import` with a :t:`renaming` with an :t:`identifier` binds the
external :t:`crate` to a local :t:`name` and introduces the local :t:`name` into
the enclosing :t:`scope`.

:dp:`fls_7vz5n3x6jo1s`
If a :t:`crate import` appears at the :t:`crate root module`, then the
:t:`crate indication` is added to the :t:`external prelude`.

:dp:`fls_3bgpc8m8yk4p`
A :t:`crate indication` shall resolve to an external :t:`crate`. The process of
resolving a :t:`crate indication` to an external :t:`crate` is tool-defined.

.. _fls_5w50kf83oo1u:

Compilation Roots
-----------------

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_fhiqvgdamq5`
A :t:`crate root module` is the root of the nested :t:`module` tree of a
:t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_1NrcosNZJu5V`
A :dt:`crate root` is the :t:`crate root module` of a :t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_tk8tl2e0a34`
A tool can define a :t:`crate root module` for a single :t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_bsyfxdk3ap1t`
A :dt:`compilation root` is an input to a compilation performed by a tool. A
:t:`crate root module` is a :t:`compilation root`.

.. _fls_u1afezy1ye99:

Conditional Compilation
-----------------------

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_9stc6nul6vq9`
:dt:`conditionally-compiled source code` is source code that may or may
not be considered a part of a Rust program depending on
:t:`[configuration predicate]s`.

:dp:`fls_a0u9nnaf6drz`
:t:`conditional compilation` is the process of compiling
:t:`conditionally-compiled source code`.

:dp:`fls_pf1v89h7pjhh`
A :t:`construct` subject to :t:`attribute` :c:`cfg` where the related
:t:`configuration predicate` evaluates to ``false`` is not considered part of a
Rust program.

:dp:`fls_y56RGw3cbFex`
A :t:`crate root module` subject to :t:`attribute` :c:`cfg` where the related
:t:`configuration predicate` evaluates to ``false`` is considered empty except
for all :t:`[attribute]s` up to the invoked :t:`attribute` :c:`cfg`.

:dp:`fls_h6b1fuw4nvi1`
An :t:`attribute` :c:`cfg_attr` where the related :t:`configuration predicate`
evaluates to ``false`` is not considered part of a Rust program.


.. _fls_8JB3SJqamdpU:

Program Entry Point
-------------------

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_dp64b08em9BJ`
A :dt:`program entry point` is a :t:`function` that is invoked at the start of
a Rust program.

:dp:`fls_sbGnkm8Ephiu`
A :t:`main function signature` is the :t:`function signature` required for the
:t:`program entry point` function named ``main``.

* :dp:`fls_o4fxok23134r`
  It lacks :t:`[function qualifier]s` ``async`` and ``unsafe``,

* :dp:`fls_bk755pvc1l53`
  Its :t:`ABI` is Rust,

* :dp:`fls_a3je4wc53bmo`
  It lacks :t:`[generic parameter]s`,

* :dp:`fls_w8q15zp7kyl0`
  It lacks :t:`[function parameter]s`,

* :dp:`fls_4psnfphsgdek`
  It lacks a :t:`return type`,

* :dp:`fls_m7xfrhqif74`
  It lacks a :t:`where clause`,

* :dp:`fls_qq9fzrw4aykd`
  It has a :t:`function body`.

.. default-domain:: spec

.. _fls_hdwwrsyunir:

Program Structure and Compilation
=================================

.. _fls_s35hob3i7lr:

Source Files
------------

.. rubric:: Syntax

.. syntax::

   SourceFile ::=
       ZeroWidthNoBreakSpace?
       Shebang?
       InnerAttributeOrDoc*
       Item*

   ZeroWidthNoBreakSpace ::=
       $$\u{FEFF}$$

   Shebang ::=
       $$#!$$ ~[NewLine]*

   NewLine ::=
       $$\n$$

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_4vicosdeaqmp`
A :dt:`source file` contains the program text consisting of :t:`[inner
attribute]s`, :t:`[inner doc comment]s`, and :t:`[item]s`. The location of a
:t:`source file` is tool defined.

:dp:`fls_ann3cha1xpek`
A :s:`Shebang` does not have an effect on the compilation.

.. _fls_e9hwvqsib5d5:

Modules
-------

.. rubric:: Syntax

.. syntax::

   ModuleDeclaration ::=
       $$unsafe$$? $$mod$$ Name ModuleSpecification

   ModuleSpecification ::=
       InlineModuleSpecification
     | OutlineModuleSpecification

   InlineModuleSpecification ::=
       $${$$
         InnerAttributeOrDoc*
         Item*
       $$}$$

   OutlineModuleSpecification ::=
       $$;$$

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_odd1hj3y1mgu`
A :dt:`module` is a container for zero or more :t:`[item]s`.

:dp:`fls_whgv72emrm47`
The ``unsafe`` :t:`keyword` of a :t:`module` is rejected, but may still
be consumed by :t:`[macro]s`.

:dp:`fls_qypjjpcf8uwq`
An :dt:`inline module` is a :t:`module` with an :s:`InlineModuleSpecification`.

:dp:`fls_cavwpr1ybk37`
An :dt:`outline module` is a :t:`module` with an :s:`OutlineModuleSpecification`.

:dp:`fls_plepew2319g4`
An :t:`outline module` loads a :t:`source file` and considers the text of the
:t:`source file` to be inlined within the context of the :t:`outline module`.

:dp:`fls_1aruwps62c4p`
The location of a :t:`module` :t:`source file` can be specified using
:t:`attribute` :c:`path`.

.. rubric:: Examples

.. code-block:: rust

   #[path = "path/to/module"]
   pub mod module {
   	#![allow(dead_code)]

        struct Struct;
        pub mod other;
   }

.. _fls_maw4u1o8q37u:

Crates
------

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_qwghk79ok5h0`
A :dt:`crate` is a unit of compilation and linking that contains a tree of
nested :t:`[module]s`.

:dp:`fls_unxalgMqIr3v`
The :dt:`crate type` of a :t:`crate` is the value of the :t:`attribute`
``crate_type`` of a :t:`crate` or the value of ``--crate-type`` flag passed to
the tool compiling the :t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_e7jGvXvTsFpC`
The :t:`crate type` of a :t:`crate` if not specified is ``bin``.

:dp:`fls_kQiJPwb2Hjcc`
A :t:`crate` may be subject to multiple :t:`[crate type]s`, treating each type
as a separate :t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_9ub6ks8qrang`
A :t:`binary crate` is a :t:`crate` whose :t:`crate type` is ``bin``.

:dp:`fls_OyFwBtDGVimT`
A :t:`binary crate` that is not subject to :t:`attribute` ``no_main`` shall have
a :t:`function` in scope of its :t:`crate root module` under the :t:`name`
``main`` with a :dt:`main function signature`.

:dp:`fls_jQqXxPyND1ds`
The :t:`function` in scope of a :t:`binary crate`'s :t:`crate root module` under
the :t:`name` ``main`` with a :t:`main function signature` is the :t:`binary
crate`'s :t:`program entry point`.

:dp:`fls_d9nn4yuiw1ja`
A :dt:`library crate` is a :t:`crate` whose :t:`crate type` is ``lib``, ``rlib``,
``staticlib``, ``dylib``, or ``cdylib``.

:dp:`fls_Mf62VqAhoZ3c`
A :dt:`proc-macro crate` is a :t:`crate` whose :t:`crate type` is ``proc-macro``.

:dp:`fls_RJJmN4tP7j4m`
A :t:`proc-macro crate` shall not declare :t:`[item]s` in its :t:`crate root
module` with  :t:`public visibility` unless the :t:`item` is a :t:`procedural
macro`.

:dp:`fls_h93C3wfbAoz1`
Only a :t:`proc-macro crate` shall declare :t:`[procedural macro]s`.

.. rubric:: Syntax

   ExternalCrateImport ::=

:dp:`fls_siv8bl6s2ndu`

:dp:`fls_7vz5n3x6jo1s`
If a :t:`crate import` appears at the :t:`crate root module`, then the

A :t:`crate indication` shall resolve to an external :t:`crate`. The process of

.. _fls_5w50kf83oo1u:

Compilation Roots
-----------------

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_fhiqvgdamq5`
A :t:`crate root module` is the root of the nested :t:`module` tree of a
:t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_1NrcosNZJu5V`
A :dt:`crate root` is the :t:`crate root module` of a :t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_tk8tl2e0a34`
A tool can define a :t:`crate root module` for a single :t:`crate`.

:dp:`fls_bsyfxdk3ap1t`
A :dt:`compilation root` is an input to a compilation performed by a tool. A
:t:`crate root module` is a :t:`compilation root`.

.. _fls_u1afezy1ye99:

Conditional Compilation
-----------------------

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_9stc6nul6vq9`
:dt:`conditionally-compiled source code` is source code that may or may
not be considered a part of a Rust program depending on
:t:`[configuration predicate]s`.

:dp:`fls_a0u9nnaf6drz`
:t:`conditional compilation` is the process of compiling

:dp:`fls_y56RGw3cbFex`
A :t:`crate root module` subject to :t:`attribute` :c:`cfg` where the related

for all :t:`[attribute]s` up to the invoked :t:`attribute` :c:`cfg`.

:dp:`fls_h6b1fuw4nvi1`
An :t:`attribute` :c:`cfg_attr` where the related :t:`configuration predicate`
evaluates to ``false`` is not considered part of a Rust program.


.. _fls_8JB3SJqamdpU:

Program Entry Point
-------------------

.. rubric:: Legality Rules

:dp:`fls_dp64b08em9BJ`
A :dt:`program entry point` is a :t:`function` that is invoked at the start of
a Rust program.

:dp:`fls_sbGnkm8Ephiu`
A :t:`main function signature` is the :t:`function signature` required for the
:t:`program entry point` function named ``main``.

* :dp:`fls_o4fxok23134r`
  It lacks :t:`[function qualifier]s` ``async`` and ``unsafe``,

* :dp:`fls_bk755pvc1l53`
